zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Humphrey Gorsuch於1510年出生在英國藍卡爾時，他的父親Lord Walter DeGorsuch20歲，母親Edusa Thrabe Dehurleton20歲。他於大約1532年與Eme Hillson在英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯可特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1545年12月24日在英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯可特享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Humphrey Gorsuch于1510年出生在英国藍卡爾时，他的父亲Lord Walter DeGorsuch20岁，母亲Edusa Thrabe Dehurleton20岁。他于大约1532年与Eme Hillson在英国英格兰藍卡爾普雷斯可特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1545年12月24日在英国英格兰藍卡爾普雷斯可特享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gorsuch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from the hamlet of Gorsuch, Lancashire, earlier Gosefordsich, from Old English Gōsford ‘goose ford’ + sīc ‘small stream’.
History: This name is first recorded as that of a manor near Ormskirk held by Walter de Gosefordsich in the late 13th century.

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably a respelling of   Laura  , that coincides in form with the German spelling of the same name and also with the medieval English given name.

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Humphrey Gorsuch was born in 1510, in Lancashire, England, his father, Lord Walter DeGorsuch, was 20 and his mother, Edusa Thrabe Dehurleton, was 20. He married Eme Hillson about 1532, in Prescot, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died on 24 December 1545, in Prescot, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Humphrey Gorsuch est né en 1510, à Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Lord Walter DeGorsuch, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Edusa Thrabe Dehurleton, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Eme Hillson environ 1532, à Prescot, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé le 24 décembre 1545, à Prescot, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Humphrey Gorsuch 1510 in Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Walter DeGorsuch 20 und seine Mutter Edusa Thrabe Dehurleton 20. Er hat um 1532 in Prescot, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Eme Hillson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb am 24. Dezember 1545 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Prescot, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Humphrey Gorsuch è nato il nel 1510 nel Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Lord Walter DeGorsuch, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Edusa Thrabe Dehurleton, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Eme Hillson circa 1532, nel Prescot, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì il 24 dicembre 1545, nel Prescot, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Humphrey Gorsuchが1510年にイギリスランカシュアイアで生まれた時，父Lord Walter DeGorsuchは20歳，母Edusa Thrabe Dehurletonは20歳であった。約1532年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアプレスコトでEme Hillsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1545年12月24日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアプレスコトで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Humphrey Gorsuch(이)가 1510년 영국 랭카실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Walter DeGorsuch(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Edusa Thrabe Dehurleton(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1532년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 프레스컷에서 Eme Hillson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1545년 12월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 프레스컷에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Humphrey Gorsuch nasceu em 1510, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Walter DeGorsuch, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Edusa Thrabe Dehurleton, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Eme Hillson aproximadamente 1532, em Prescot, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 24 de dezembro de 1545, em Prescot, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Humphrey Gorsuch родился в 1510 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord Walter DeGorsuch было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Edusa Thrabe Dehurleton, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Eme Hillson около 1532 г. в местности прескот, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер 24 декабря 1545 г. в местности прескот, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Humphrey Gorsuch nació en 1510, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord Walter DeGorsuch, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Edusa Thrabe Dehurleton, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Eme Hillson aproximadamente 1532, en Prescot, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió el 24 de diciembre de 1545, en Prescot, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 35 años.
